User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, either a student or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity, matches Firebase Auth UID.

photoURL.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

role.description: Role of the user (e.g., student, admin).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Position.title: Position
Position.description: Represents a committee position held by a student in a program.

userId.description: The ID of the user holding the position.

userName.description: The name of the user for display in admin panel.

matricId.description: The matriculation ID of the student submitting the claim.

positionName.description: The name of the position held (e.g., Chairman, Secretary).

customPositionDetail.description: Specific detail if the position is 'Other Committee Members'.

programName.description: The name of the program where the position was held.

peringkat.description: The level of the program (e.g., Kebangsaan, Negeri).

semester.description: The semester the student was in when they held the position.

className.description: The class or group of the student.

verificationStatus.description: The status of the verification request.

rejectionRemark.description: The reason provided by an admin for rejecting the position claim.

evidenceUrl.description: Public URL to the uploaded evidence image.

evidenceStoragePath.description: The path to the evidence image in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the position was submitted.

Program.title: Program
Program.description: Represents a program or event with a scannable QR code for attendance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the program entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the program.

location.description: Location where the program will be held.

startDateTime.description: The combined start date and time of the program.

endDateTime.description: The combined end date and time of the program.

qrSlug.description: A unique, short, URL-friendly slug for the public QR form link.

redirectUrl.description: An optional URL to redirect the user to after they submit the attendance form.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User (admin) who created the program.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the program was created.

checkInOpenTime.description: The time when check-in becomes available.

checkInCloseTime.description: The time when check-in is no longer available.

checkOutOpenTime.description: The time when check-out becomes available.

checkOutCloseTime.description: The time when check-out is no longer available.

ProgramConfig.title: Program Configuration
ProgramConfig.description: Defines the settings and fields for a program's public attendance form.

copywriting.description: Custom text or instructions to display at the top of the attendance form.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents a single attendance submission from the public QR form.

studentName.description: Full name of the attending student.

customInput1.description: Value for the first custom field.

customInput2.description: Value for the second custom field.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the attendance was recorded (check-in).

checkOutAt.description: The timestamp when the user checked out.

checkOutStatus.description: The status of the checkout validation.

durationMinutes.description: The duration of attendance in minutes.

userAgent.description: The browser/device user agent of the person submitting the form.

QrSlug.title: QR Slug Mapping
QrSlug.description: Maps a public-facing QR slug to an internal program ID.

programId.description: The ID of the program this slug points to.

MatricId.title: Matric ID Uniqueness
MatricId.description: Ensures matriculation IDs are unique. The document ID is the matric ID itself.

uid.description: The user ID (UID) of the student who owns this matric ID.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the matric ID was claimed.

definition.description: Stores individual user profile data (students and admins).
Stores positions held by a student, pending admin verification.
Stores details for all programs and events.
Stores the form configuration for a specific program.
Stores individual attendance submissions for a program.
Publicly readable index to map unique URL slugs to program IDs.
Stores a mapping of matriculation IDs to user UIDs to enforce uniqueness. Document ID is the matriculation ID.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure separates core program data from its form configuration and its attendance records. Public data (`programs`, `programConfigs`) is structured to be readable by unauthenticated users on a per-document basis for the QR form page, while sensitive data like attendance lists is nested and protected. A 'positions' sub-collection is added under 'users' to manage role verification requests.
